news.title:
CCI probes Tata Steel, JSW Steel, SAIL, and RINL for alleged cartel behavior via WhatsApp chats and production cuts.
Investigation reveals synchronized price changes, controlled production cuts, implicating top executives; firms deny wrongdoing.
news.summary:
CCI probes Tata Steel, JSW Steel, SAIL, and RINL for alleged cartel behavior via WhatsApp chats and production cuts.
Investigation reveals synchronized price changes, controlled production cuts, implicating top executives; firms deny wrongdoing.

news.title:
JSW Steel's MSCI weight to rise by $134M (Rs 12.2B) in Feb rejig.
The MSCI February Rejig is scheduled for today at 3 PM.
news.summary:
JSW Steel's MSCI weight to rise by $134M (Rs 12.2B) in Feb rejig.
The MSCI February Rejig is scheduled for today at 3 PM.

news.title:
Metal stocks surged 7% as US tariff uncertainty boosted buying momentum.
Analysts suggest buying on dips with potential upside of up to 25%.
news.summary:
Metal stocks surged 7% as US tariff uncertainty boosted buying momentum.
Analysts suggest buying on dips with potential upside of up to 25%.

news.title:
Citi assigns Overweight rating to Vedanta, citing 15% upside potential, and Underweight rating to JSW Steel citing limited gains.
BofA upgraded Vedanta to Buy, raised target by 75% to ₹840, driven by bullish aluminium, silver prices, and strong dividend yield.
news.summary:
Citi assigns Overweight rating to Vedanta, citing 15% upside potential, and Underweight rating to JSW Steel citing limited gains.
BofA upgraded Vedanta to Buy, raised target by 75% to ₹840, driven by bullish aluminium, silver prices, and strong dividend yield.

news.title:
Nifty Metal index gained 7.6% in February; Tata Steel, Adani Ent., Jindal Steel, Lloyds advanced 10-13%.
Brokerages favor JSW Steel, Vedanta, Lloyds with strong demand, price hikes, and growth prospects driving optimism.
news.summary:
Nifty Metal index gained 7.6% in February; Tata Steel, Adani Ent., Jindal Steel, Lloyds advanced 10-13%.
Brokerages favor JSW Steel, Vedanta, Lloyds with strong demand, price hikes, and growth prospects driving optimism.

news.title:
Supreme Court upholds Karnataka's forfeiture of ₹128 crore from JSW Steel.
The forfeiture cited JSW Steel's failure to meet iron ore production norms.
news.summary:
Supreme Court upholds Karnataka's forfeiture of ₹128 crore from JSW Steel.
The forfeiture cited JSW Steel's failure to meet iron ore production norms.

news.title: SC declines to stay Rs 1.28B demand against JSW Steel in iron ore case.
news.summary: SC declines to stay Rs 1.28B demand against JSW Steel in iron ore case.

news.title:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.
news.summary:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.

news.title:
Government bond prices dip ahead of ₹379B state debt auction; 10-20 year bonds attract better bids due to higher yields.
Private placements active: JSW Steel (₹50B), Axis Bank (₹350B), REC Limited (₹30B), and others raising funds via bonds.
news.summary:
Government bond prices dip ahead of ₹379B state debt auction; 10-20 year bonds attract better bids due to higher yields.
Private placements active: JSW Steel (₹50B), Axis Bank (₹350B), REC Limited (₹30B), and others raising funds via bonds.

news.title:
Tata Steel, ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel, and JSW Steel increase scrap use as green steel norms begin.
Govt issues green steel star ratings and mandates PSUs to use certified green steel in projects.
news.summary:
Tata Steel, ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel, and JSW Steel increase scrap use as green steel norms begin.
Govt issues green steel star ratings and mandates PSUs to use certified green steel in projects.

news.title:
India Inc's Q3FY26 profits rose 14.7% YoY, highest in 8 quarters.
Growth driven by public OMCs, banks, non-bank lenders, and metals/mining firms.
news.summary:
India Inc's Q3FY26 profits rose 14.7% YoY, highest in 8 quarters.
Growth driven by public OMCs, banks, non-bank lenders, and metals/mining firms.

news.title:
JSW Steel's Jan 2026 crude steel production hit 24.75 lakh tonnes, Indian ops slightly up YoY.
USA production fell due to maintenance, BF3 blast furnace upgrade to complete by Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
JSW Steel's Jan 2026 crude steel production hit 24.75 lakh tonnes, Indian ops slightly up YoY.
USA production fell due to maintenance, BF3 blast furnace upgrade to complete by Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Indian bond issuances rise, with states raising ₹380B and corporates like Axis Bank, NHPC, and REC planning major fundraising.
Major corporates include JSW Steel (₹50B), Torrent Pharma (₹30B), and Prestige Estates (₹20B). Municipal issuances also active.
news.summary:
Indian bond issuances rise, with states raising ₹380B and corporates like Axis Bank, NHPC, and REC planning major fundraising.
Major corporates include JSW Steel (₹50B), Torrent Pharma (₹30B), and Prestige Estates (₹20B). Municipal issuances also active.

news.title:
JSW Steel anticipates margin expansion driven by strong growth and pricing stability.
The company benefits from safeguard duty, supporting its performance.
news.summary:
JSW Steel anticipates margin expansion driven by strong growth and pricing stability.
The company benefits from safeguard duty, supporting its performance.

news.title:
JSW Steel's quality grade downgraded to Average by MarketsMojo on 28 Jan 2026.
Downgrade reflects changes in profitability, debt, and operational consistency assessments.
news.summary:
JSW Steel's quality grade downgraded to Average by MarketsMojo on 28 Jan 2026.
Downgrade reflects changes in profitability, debt, and operational consistency assessments.

news.title:
Indian steelmakers excluded from full tariff elimination in India-EU trade deal; steel given preferential market access via TRQs.
JSW Steel exports 1.2-1.3 MT annually to EU; CBAM to impact export costs due to high emissions, with payments starting in 2027.
news.summary:
Indian steelmakers excluded from full tariff elimination in India-EU trade deal; steel given preferential market access via TRQs.
JSW Steel exports 1.2-1.3 MT annually to EU; CBAM to impact export costs due to high emissions, with payments starting in 2027.

news.title:
JSW Steel anticipates strong steel demand in Q4FY26, aided by a better product mix.
JFE JV to unlock value at BPSL; focus on debt to EBITDA ratio and reducing borrowing costs.
news.summary:
JSW Steel anticipates strong steel demand in Q4FY26, aided by a better product mix.
JFE JV to unlock value at BPSL; focus on debt to EBITDA ratio and reducing borrowing costs.

news.title:
UltraTech Cement, JSW Steel, and BPCL posted strong Q3 results, exceeding expectations in profit, revenue, and margins.
HCLTech acquired Finergic Solutions, while Zydus and Torrent received positive US FDA updates. Kotak Bank raised up to ₹15,000 crore via NCDs.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement, JSW Steel, and BPCL posted strong Q3 results, exceeding expectations in profit, revenue, and margins.
HCLTech acquired Finergic Solutions, while Zydus and Torrent received positive US FDA updates. Kotak Bank raised up to ₹15,000 crore via NCDs.

news.title:
Nomura maintains 'Buy' on Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Jindal Steel citing strong domestic price momentum despite global challenges.
HRC prices rose 11% QoQ to Rs 52,400/tonne due to safeguard duties, cost pressures, and improved market sentiment.
news.summary:
Nomura maintains 'Buy' on Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Jindal Steel citing strong domestic price momentum despite global challenges.
HRC prices rose 11% QoQ to Rs 52,400/tonne due to safeguard duties, cost pressures, and improved market sentiment.

news.title:
JSW Steel plans ₹2T investment by FY31, focusing on domestic demand.
CEO Jayant Acharya discusses industry outlook and CCI price collusion probe.
news.summary:
JSW Steel plans ₹2T investment by FY31, focusing on domestic demand.
CEO Jayant Acharya discusses industry outlook and CCI price collusion probe.
